title_cn: 战火冲击波：中东局势下泰国能源与供应链的多重压力与应对
desc_original: The escalating conflict in the Middle East, particularly the looming threat of a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, is casting a long shadow over the economy.
summary_cn: 中东冲突持续升级，霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）被封锁的威胁日益逼近，泰国经济面临严峻考验。作为石油进口依赖型经济体，泰国在能源供应安全、原材料成本上涨和供应链稳定等多个层面承受压力，政府和企业正积极研究应对替代方案，全面评估冲击规模。

title_cn: 大选后续：最高行政法院仍在审查18起选举及公投相关案件
desc_original: The Supreme Administrative Court is reviewing 18 cases related to the recent election and referendum, with one case already dismissed, two rejected, and one withdrawn, says Prawit Boonthiem, vice president of the court.
summary_cn: 最高行政法院（Supreme Administrative Court）副院长巴威·汶提姆（Prawit Boonthiem）表示，法院目前仍在审查与近期大选及公投相关的18起案件，其中1起已被撤销、2起被驳回、1起由申请方主动撤回，其余案件仍在程序推进中，选后法律争议清理工作持续进行。

title_cn: 中东紧张局势推高泰国化肥价格，孔敬（Khon Kaen）调查显示尿素（Urea）零售价大幅上涨
desc_original: A survey in Khon Kaen on Friday has found the retail price of urea fertiliser to have increased by about 50 baht per sack as stocks at several distributors become depleted ahead of planting season.
summary_cn: 对孔敬府（Khon Kaen）的调查显示，受中东紧张局势影响，尿素（Urea）化肥零售价格每袋上涨约50铢，多家经销商库存已告紧张。此次涨价恰逢农业播种季前，对农民成本造成直接压力，当地农业部门正密切关注供应动态，评估后续影响。

summary_cn: 2026年初，社交媒体流传「泰国将每天向外国游客发放2000铢」的消息，引发广泛讨论。泰国官方随即澄清，此说法纯属谣言，政府从未制定或讨论过此类政策。当局呼吁公众通过官方渠道核实旅游相关信息，避免被误导性内容混淆，以免损害泰国旅游业形象。

summary_cn: 本文为评论文章，写作于美以联合打击伊朗后第6天。文章指出伊朗已反击多个海湾国家美军目标及以色列，冲突造成超千名平民死亡，据报包括168名女学生罹难。作者以霍尔木兹封锁第6天为切入点，呼吁泰国在「丛林法则」主导的新国际秩序中保持独立外交立场，拒绝随美国立场起舞。

title_cn: 北柳府（Chachoengsao）Ban Pho区稀释剂（Thinner）化工厂发生大火并伴随爆炸
summary_cn: 2026年3月6日下午4时，差春骚府（Chachoengsao）班珀区（Ban Pho）Cargo Chemical公司（生产稀释剂和易燃化学品）发生重大火灾，浓烟冲天、多次连环爆炸。事发初期有工人被困，消防队紧急出动扑救，周边居民被疏散，火势得到初步控制，暂无死亡报告，事故原因正在调查中。

title_cn: 泰国移民局（Immigration）反驳柬埔寨媒体关于游客在泰遭受不当对待的报道

Officials
summary_cn: 台湾法院判决两名泰国女性因走私海洛因（Heroin）入狱，二人于去年9月通过吞咽毒品包装袋并藏匿于身体隐私部位的方式将毒品带入台湾。两人于9月7日在高雄机场落网，台湾当局此前接到线报后已提前加强相关航班旅客安检力度。

title_cn: 🔄 中东战争能源风险警告：泰国资本市场高管称冲突或持续逾一个月、供应缺口难免
desc_original: The war in the Middle East could become a prolonged geopolitical risk, with attacks already spreading across the region and likely to persist for more than a month, potentially causing an energy supply shortage, warn capital market executives.
summary_cn: 泰国资本市场高管发出警告：中东战争已演变为持续性地缘政治风险，袭击已蔓延至多个区域，冲突预计将持续超过一个月，届时将不可避免地造成能源供应缺口。对石油进口依赖度较高的泰国而言，这一风险对经济和金融市场构成重大威胁，投资者需警惕能源价格剧烈波动。

title_cn: 🔄 撤侨行动启动：首批69名在伊泰国公民3月7日经陆路赴土耳其、再乘机回国
desc_original: Thai nationals in Iran to begin return journey amid Middle East tensions Legacy Thailand’s government has confirmed that 125 Thai nationals in Iran have requested repatriation, with the first group of 69 set to depart on March 7 by land to Van, Turkey, before flying home. The update came following a meeting of the Centre for Administration and Monitoring of Situations in the Middle East (CAMSME), with details shared at a briefing at 6.25pm on March 6 at Government House. Panidom Pachimsawa
summary_cn: 泰国政府确认，目前在伊朗共有125名泰国公民申请回国撤侨。首批69人将于3月7日从伊朗出发，经陆路前往土耳其范城（Van），再转乘飞机返回泰国。相关协调工作由中东局势管理与监测中心（CAMSME）负责，撤侨行动于3月6日晚政府大厅新闻发布会后正式启动。

title_cn: 修宪使命遭遇政治现实：人民党主导改革愿景能否驾驭新国会博弈？
desc_original: The post-election political landscape has entered a delicate new phase after voters endorsed the first step towards constitutional change in a referendum held alongside the Feb 8 general election — a victory claimed by the People’s Party.
summary_cn: 2月8日大选同步举行的公投中，选民支持启动修宪进程，人民党（People's Party）将此视为改革授权的重要信号。然而选后政治格局错综复杂，人民党主导的修宪议程在新国会内面临多党博弈，如何在保守势力与各方盟友之间寻求共识，将是决定修宪进程能否推进的关键变量。

title_cn: 专家警告：泰国面临经济、地缘和气候三重危机，必须火速完成新政府组建

summary_cn: 柬埔寨当局在边境关卡逮捕了一对被骗入电话诈骗园区的泰国情侣：25岁舞蹈演员蓬萨坤（Pongsakorn Phueanpharam）和23岁女友帕纳达（Panadda Chokeboonrueang）。二人于2月24日以求职为由进入柬埔寨后失联，现已被安全带回泰国，结束了诈骗园区的噩梦经历。

title_cn: 春武里（Chon Buri）中国男子疑他杀后伪装自缢：身有电击枪痕和殴打伤，三份遗书存疑

His wounds and bruises are consistent with an assault and possible use of a stun gun. A construction contractor, 41 year old Ekkapoj Nundee, found the body while working near the Khao Talo railway track. Ekkapoj said he was assigned to spray water on a nearby road to
summary_cn: 警方正在调查一名中国男子在春武里府（Chon Buri）铁路附近死亡案，尸体以绳索悬挂，现场遗留三份手写遗书。然而法医发现其身上有与殴打和电击枪（Stun Gun）使用相符的伤痕和瘀伤，严重质疑自杀说法，案件目前被列为疑似他杀案进行深入调查。

The National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC) has now issued a preliminary finding after inspecting the area. The issue gained attention after TikTok user @iggunji posted a clip with the captioned headline stating that Town in Town, Wang Tho
summary_cn: 曼谷Town in Town区（王通郎）居民反映摩托车遥控启动系统反复失灵，疑似受无线信号干扰。国家广播与电信委员会（NBTC）已完成初步现场检查并发布阶段性调查结论，事件经TikTok视频曝光后获广泛关注，与同一区域此前发生的MEA通讯系统事件相互关联，干扰来源尚待确认。

title_cn: 素攀武里（Suphan Buri）男子被控杀女友后伪装自杀：监控录像揭穿全过程，家属上媒体施压警方立案
desc_original: Thai man accused of killing girlfriend, presents her death as suicide Legacy A Thai man in Suphan Buri province denied an accusation of killing his girlfriend and presenting the death as a suicide . CCTV footage from their accommodation reportedly exposed his criminal act. The case drew public attention after the woman’s relatives approached several news outlets and appeared on Channel 3’s Hone Krasae programme yesterday, March 4, to share details they said were suspicious. The family said polic
summary_cn: 素攀武里府（Suphan Buri）一名男子被指控杀害女友后将死亡伪装为自杀，本人坚决否认。其住处监控录像据报揭露了事件经过，女方家属随即在媒体曝光，并上电视节目施压警方立案。此案引发公众对女性人身安全问题的广泛关注，警方已介入立案调查。

title_cn: 「哈他利」（Hatari）电扇创始人俊·华纳维（Jun Wanavit）辞世享年89岁，十年捐款15亿铢的慈善传奇
desc_original: BANGKOK — Jun Wanavit, founder and owner of Thai electric fan maker Hatari, has died peacefully at the age of 89. Jun, widely known as “Ah Kong Jun”, rose to national prominence in 2022 after donating 900 million baht to the Ramathibodi Foundation to support the construction of a new medical building and innovation projects. The donation sparked widespread admiration on social media, with many Thais posting photos of Hatari fans in their homes in tribute. He was later recognised by Forbes as one
summary_cn: 泰国知名电扇品牌哈他利（Hatari）创始人俊·华纳维（Jun Wanavit），人称「阿公俊」（Ah Kong Jun），安详辞世，享年89岁。他于2022年向玛希隆大学附属医院拉玛提博迪基金会（Ramathibodi Foundation）捐款9亿铢而广为人知，此后被《福布斯》（Forbes）列入泰国慈善家名单，十年累计捐款逾15亿铢，深受泰国各界爱戴。

title_cn: 春武里（Chon Buri）男子持一米武士刀砍伤摩托维修师27针并几乎割断耳朵，维修费纠纷激化
desc_original: Thai man attacks mechanic with samurai sword over motorcycle repair dispute Legacy Police in Chon Buri arrested a Thai man for attacking a motorcycle repairman with a samurai sword , leaving the victim needing 27 stitches and suffering an ear injury that was nearly severed. Officers from Bang Lamung Police Station arrested the suspect, 53 year old Anucha Boonthawon, yesterday, March 4, and seized a one-metre samurai sword. Police said the attack took place at a rented room at about 10.30pm on Mo
summary_cn: 春武里府（Chon Buri）警方逮捕53岁男子阿努查·汶他旺（Anucha Boonthawon），其因摩托维修费用纠纷持一米长武士刀袭击修车师傅，造成对方耳朵几乎被割断，伤口需缝合27针。案发于3月3日夜间约10:30，嫌犯已被带押候审，缴获武士刀一把，案件背景为长期积累的维修费用纠纷激化。

title_cn: 美国贸易代表（USTR）2025恶名市场报告：曼谷市中心一购物中心因知识产权侵权被点名，泰国执法获肯定
desc_original: BANGKOK — The United States Trade Representative (USTR) has listed one shopping centre in central Bangkok among markets with high levels of intellectual property (IP) infringement in its 2025 Notorious Markets Report, Thai officials said. Armon Thapthawitham, director-general of the Department of Intellectual Property, said the report, released on 3 March, identified 37 online markets and 32 physical markets across 19 countries. For Thailand, only one physical market — a shopping mall in central
summary_cn: 美国贸易代表（USTR）在其2025年「恶名市场」报告（Notorious Markets Report）中，将曼谷市中心一座购物中心列为知识产权（IP）侵权高发场所。该报告共涉及19个国家37个网络市场和32个实体市场。泰国知识产权局（Department of Intellectual Property）局长指出，泰国在执法层面获得肯定评价，全国仅有一处实体市场被点名。

title_cn: 全球硬件价格剧烈波动令泰国IT采购陷入困境：服务器采购无法做计划，市场波动创近年新高
desc_original: Purchasing IT equipment, particularly servers, has become significantly more difficult due to market volatility, said a veteran IT executive who requested anonymity.
summary_cn: 一位不愿具名的资深IT高管指出，受全球市场剧烈波动影响，泰国企业在采购IT设备（尤其是服务器）方面面临前所未有的困难。价格波动幅度已超过近年历史水平，令企业采购计划难以制定，成本核算存在较大不确定性，数字化转型和基础设施升级项目进度受到制约。

title_cn: 泰国家庭在上海酒店惊遇男员工藏身床底，TikTok视频引发国际广泛关注

In the clips, a man is seen lying in a narrow gap between her father’s bed and the wall, appearing to hide. Yatida asked how
summary_cn: 泰国女性雅提达（Yatida Siriwangchai）于3月3日在TikTok（账号@tyatida）发布视频，记录了一名上海酒店男性员工藏身其父亲床底的经过，视频中当事人被发现时正躲在床与墙壁之间的狭缝中。该员工事后声称系误入房间。雅提达家庭已启动法律程序向酒店追责，视频在国际社交平台引发大量关注。

title_cn: 芭提雅市政收回Soi 5 Thanwa遭侵占公共用地，路面拓宽工程启动以缓解交通压力
desc_original: Poramet Ngampichet and Manot Nongyai inspect the reclaimed public land at Soi 5 Thanwa as Pattaya moves forward with plans to widen the roadway. Officials from the city’s Engineering Department were also present to provide technical details. Mayor Poramet revealed that the visit focused o
summary_cn: 芭提雅市长颇拉梅（Poramet Ngampichet）与副市长马诺（Manot Nongyai）于3月4日亲赴Soi 5 Thanwa（他纳5巷）视察公共用地收回进展。相关土地此前遭到侵占，市政府已启动路面拓宽工程，旨在缓解该路段长期存在的交通拥堵问题，市政工程部门官员同步提供技术支持。

The caption read: “If you’re going to sulk, at least pick a safe place. It’s dangerous.” In the footage, the
summary_cn: 一段视频在网络爆红：一名年轻女子在春武里府（Chonburi）基里-昂西拉（Kiri-Ang Sila）路口正中央静坐，疑因与男友争吵后一时冲动，脱鞋乱砸并拦截过往车辆。视频引发大量网友就道路安全及情绪管理展开激烈讨论，有人呼吁警方加强对危险行为的执法力度。

title_cn: 恰青沙奥（Chachoengsao）凌晨大麻醉汉持续威胁路人讨烟，警民合力将其制伏拘捕
desc_original: Man high on cannabis threatens and demands cigarettes, gets beaten Legacy Police were called to a roadside stall in Bang Pakong district, Chachoengsao, earlier today, March 5, after a man allegedly threatened people while going around asking for cigarettes . At 4am, officers from Bang Pakong Police Station received a report that a man was threatening to harm people at a roadside shack in Bang Samak Subdistrict, Bang Pakong District.
summary_cn: 3月5日凌晨4时，差春骚府（Chachoengsao）邦巴功区（Bang Pakong）警方接报，一名男子疑似在大麻（Cannabis）影响下四处威胁路人讨要香烟，令周边居民感到恐慌。嫌疑人随后被当地一群年轻人合力制伏后遭警方拘捕，此案引发社区对大麻滥用问题的再度关注。

title_cn: 沙拉武里（Saraburi）颠覆传统婚礼：女方领"汉玛"队伍、带40万铢彩礼向男方求婚
desc_original: SARABURI — 4 March 2026, In a reversal of traditional roles, a bride led the engagement procession and brought a 400,000 baht dowry to formally propose to her groom after more than eight years together. Family members and friends from both sides attended the ceremony in a joyful atmosphere. The highlight of the event was the khan mak procession, w
summary_cn: 沙拉武里府（Saraburi）一场婚礼打破传统习俗：新娘杜安哈泰马（Duanghathaimat Chaiwong，昵称Ice）亲自率领「汉玛」（Khan Mak）迎亲队伍，携40万铢彩礼向男方吉拉育（Jirayuth Khamphu，昵称Toy）正式求婚，二人已相恋逾八年。婚礼在阿迪森军营（Adisorn Camp）内举行，亲友见证了这一反传统角色的温馨时刻。

title_cn: 春武里（Chon Buri）比特犬（Pit Bull）咬伤外卖骑手，伤者感染就医，屋主称门锁未关
desc_original: Owner blames unsecured door as pit bull bites delivery driver Legacy A parcel delivery rider is seeking compensation after a pit bull attack left her with an infected wound during a delivery at a home in Chon Buri province, an incident the owner linked to an unsecured door. The case dates back to February 23, when the rider, identified as 49 year old Saifon, was bitten on the upper part of her right leg while attempting to deliver an order. She remains in treatment at Vibharam Amata Nakorn Hospi
summary_cn: 春武里府（Chon Buri）一名49岁外卖骑手赛丰（Saifon）在送货时被屋主饲养的比特犬（Pit Bull）咬伤大腿，伤口随后感染，仍在维帕拉阿玛他那空医院（Vibharam Amata Nakorn Hospital）接受治疗。屋主将此事归咎于门锁未关，受害者目前要求屋主承担赔偿责任，双方就责任归属产生争议。

title_cn: 泰国街头美食史：椰奶糕（Khanom Krok）的起源与东南亚各国同类食品
desc_original: Few Thai street snacks are as iconic as khanom krok, small round coconut rice cakes with a crisp shell and creamy centre. Made from rice flour, sugar and coconut milk, the dessert is traditionally cooked in a cast iron pan with small indentations over charcoal heat. Vendors pour two batters into each well, typically one lightly salted coconut base and one sweet topping, before pressing two half moons together into a single bite sized disc. Mont lin ma yar in Myanmar Variations of this coconut ba
summary_cn: 椰奶糕（Khanom Krok）是泰国最具代表性的街头小食之一，以米粉、糖和椰奶为主料，传统上用带小圆形凹槽的铸铁锅置于炭火上烹制，外壳酥脆、内芯嫩滑。文章追溯其历史渊源，并介绍东南亚各国的同类食品，如缅甸的蒙林马亚（Mont lin ma yar），展现这一小食在区域饮食文化中的共通性。

Posting a video on the TikTok account @drmosodc , the dentist said the patient had noticed a white object inside the nose for some time and sought a medical check-up due to concern. The cause was repo
summary_cn: 泰国牙医「莫斯医生」（Dr. Mos，TikTok账号@drmosodc）于3月4日发布视频，披露一起罕见病例：一名患者因长期发现鼻腔内有白色异物就诊，经检查发现系一颗牙齿穿入鼻腔所致。该视频发布后迅速获得数百万次浏览，引发网友对牙科解剖知识的广泛好奇与讨论。

title_cn: 泰国野象入侵农田和居民区代价攀升，人象冲突（Human-Elephant Conflict）治理成本持续增加
desc_original: The death of a 20-year-old wild elephant during relocation in Loei has intensified scrutiny of the government's handling of escalating human-elephant conflict in the Northeast.
summary_cn: 泰国东北部廊开府（Loei）一头20岁野象在转移过程中死亡，此事件引发外界对政府处理人象冲突（Human-Elephant Conflict）方式的强烈质疑。野象持续侵占农田和居民区，造成财产损失和人员伤亡，政府现行的转移安置方案成本高企且效果存疑，相关治理政策面临日益严峻的社会审视。

summary_cn: 总理安努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）亲赴素林府（Surin），参与泰国红十字会（Thai Red Cross Society）「心翼行动」（Hearts on Wings）紧急器官空运任务。本次任务动用Cirrus SR22T飞机，将诗里拉医院（Siriraj Hospital）外科医生紧急运抵素林执行器官摘取手术，所摘器官将用于等待移植的危重患者。

Police were dispatched to the scene along with 191 patrol officers. Wit
summary_cn: 3月4日下午1时，乌冬他尼府（Udon Thani）警方接报，一名43岁男子在市区乌冬他尼城市博物馆（Udon Thani City Museum）前公开暴露私处。该男子被捕后向警方解释称是因天气炎热而脱裤，警方已以公共场所猥亵罪对其提起诉讼。

title_cn: 普吉岛芭东（Patong）Sensei Padel Club开业推广：板式网球（Padel）运动体验
desc_original: Play padel and unwind at the Sensei Padel Club in Patong, Phuket Legacy Sensei Padel Club brings a piece of one of the world’s fastest-growing sports right to Patong, Phuket . Padel combines the best elements of tennis and squash into a fun, social, and easy-to-learn game suitable for players of all ages and skill levels. Sensei Padel
summary_cn: Sensei Padel Club在普吉岛芭东区（Patong）正式开业，成为当地唯一提供板式网球（Padel）运动的专业场馆。Padel融合网球与壁球元素，适合各年龄层和不同水平的运动者。该俱乐部同时定位为健康休闲目的地，为南部岛屿运动爱好者提供新选择，有望推动普吉岛运动旅游发展。

title_cn: 普旭（Pruksa）持续压缩新盘发布计划，全年仅7个项目82亿铢
desc_original: SET-listed developer Pruksa Holding continues to scale back new residential launches this year, planning only seven projects worth a combined 8.2 billion baht as it shifts focus to clearing unsold inventory worth 66 billion baht and expanding recurring-income assets.

title_cn: 泰国数字委员会（Digital Council of Thailand）呼吁建立数据主权，优先使用本土AI和软件
desc_original: Thailand urgently needs to develop digital data sovereignty under Thai jurisdiction, while prioritising the use of more locally developed artificial intelligence (AI) and software, according to the Digital Council of Thailand (DCT).

title_cn: 泰国国际学校（International School）增长触及瓶颈，出生率下降威胁扩张势头
desc_original: Thailand's decade-long surge in international schools is approaching a plateau, as falling birth rates and demographic shifts threaten to curb expansion in a sector that has nearly tripled in size since 2014.

summary_cn: 泰国东部经济走廊办公室（EECO）秘书长朱拉·苏克马诺（Dr. Chula Sukmanop）出席由英国泰国商会（BCCT）八十周年纪念暨多国商会联合举办的「东部经济走廊洞察与对接」论坛，向各国商界代表解读EEC最新投资路线图及政策重点，吸引外资进入泰国东部经济特区。

summary_cn: 3月3日，芭提雅副市长马诺（Manot）下令市政官员配合珂兰岛（Koh Larn）动物保护义工，将一条病危流浪犬紧急运送至大陆进行救治。此次联合救援行动获得当地居民和动物爱好者的广泛赞誉，体现了官民协作推动动物福利的积极姿态。

desc_original: Looking ahead, JLL expects the luxury residential segment in Bangkok to strengthen gradually as end-user demand becomes the primary market driver and developers maintain disciplined supply strategies. desc_original: The commercial real estate market is expected to remain resilient in 2026, with demand concentrated in hotels, data centres, industrial and logistics assets, and high-quality office and retail space, according to property consultancy JLL Thailand.

summary_cn: 外媒对泰国大选结果进行深度解读，保守派民力党（Bhumjaithai Party）在选举中强势获胜，其后依次为人民党（People's Party）118席、为泰党（Pheu Thai）74席、民主党（Democrat Party）22席。文章分析保守势力如何借助此次胜选重新整合泰国政治权力版图，进一步巩固建制派在议会的主导地位。

title_cn: BBC深度：泰国强大的庇护网络（Patronage System）如何令政治局外人在大选中屡遭壁垒
desc_original: By the time of the 2026 campaign, the Pitutechas had learned from their setback in the previous election. In Districts 3 and 4, they ran younger members of the family, better educated and with less of a godfather image than the older generation.
summary_cn: BBC深度报道分析泰国根深蒂固的庇护网络（Patronage System）如何在大选中系统性地排斥政治局外人。以皮图查（Pitutecha）家族为例，该家族在2026年大选中吸取上届教训，在关键选区推出更年轻、受教育程度更高、「大佬形象」更淡的家族成员参选，展示了传统政治世家的延续性适应能力，令外来挑战者难以突破。

title_cn: 建制派稳守泰国政坛：进步力量折翼，柬埔寨冲突与经济疲软成选举关键变量
desc_original: The results signal popular support for Thailand’s military and royalist establishment after a year defined by sluggish economic growth and the eruption of a conflict with Cambodia that displaced nearly half a million people on either side of the border. Amidst uncertainty at home and a changing order abroad, Thailand’s voters opted for the conservative status quo.
summary_cn: 大选结果显示，泰国选民在经历经济增长低迷和与柬埔寨边境冲突（波及近50万难民）的一年后，选择向军事和保皇建制派靠拢。进步改革力量在此次选举中受到明显压制，面对国内外双重不确定性，泰国选民整体倾向于保守的政治稳定选项，建制派成功稳守政坛主导地位。

title_cn: 《星报》长篇解读泰国大选：安努廷193席大胜、人民党（People's Party）远落后、塔克辛系（Thaksin）败局

title_cn: 普吉城（Phuket Town）366台CCTV联网24小时控制室，智慧安防系统全面扩容
desc_original: In Phuket Town, more than 366 CCTV cameras are linked to a central control room that operates 24 hours a day. The project aims to increase coverage throughout the city and thus enable faster detection and response to incidents.
summary_cn: 普吉城（Phuket Town）已完成对366台以上闭路电视（CCTV）摄像头的联网整合，统一接入24小时运营的中央控制室，实现城区全覆盖监控。该智慧安防项目旨在大幅提升事件发现和应急响应速度，是普吉府持续推进智慧城市建设的重要组成部分。

desc_original: PHUKET — Residents in Rawai have raised concerns over foreign tourists sunbathing and swimming naked on a public beach, questioning whether the practice is appropriate and calling on authorities to investigate. The images triggered widespread debate online. The post asked whether a so-called “nude beach” in Phuket was suit
summary_cn: 普吉岛拉威区（Rawai）居民向当局反映，有外国游客在当地公共海滩裸体日晒和游泳，质疑此举是否符合当地文化和法律规范。「Phuket Info Center」于3月2日发布现场照片后，引发网络热议，当地居民呼吁官方尽快介入调查并采取管理措施，明确公共海滩相关行为规范。

The 58 year old British businessman, Griffiths, was found dead on February 9 after falling from his 18th-floor apartment in Pattaya . Police said they suspected suicide , reporting the room was lo
summary_cn: ASOS联合创始人、58岁英国商人昆廷·格里菲斯（Quentin Griffiths）于2月9日被发现坠亡于芭提雅一处18楼公寓，警方初步判断为自杀。其泰籍前妻随即申请三名子女的监护权，并指控自离婚后被长达近五年阻止探视孩子，案件涉及跨国家庭法律纠纷和遗产争议，引发国际媒体关注。

summary_cn: 曼谷设计周（Bangkok Design Week）2026以城市遗产活化（Heritage Restoration）为战略核心，将历史街区复兴与创意经济发展相结合，旨在构建可持续的创意商业生态系统。本届活动同时承担国际文化交流平台功能，包括菲律宾时装展览「LAHI」，以曼谷为东盟（ASEAN）创意经济合作的发布平台，定位亚洲创意枢纽。

title_cn: 阿提哈德航空（Etihad）2026年10月起派A380执飞阿布扎比—曼谷苏万纳普（Suvarnabhumi）航线
desc_original: The aircraft will operate on Etihad’s evening daily service between Abu Dhabi’s Zayed International Airport and Bangkok Suvarnabhumi, further strengthening connectivity between Southeast Asia, the Middle East and Europe as the airline adds capacity ahead of the busy winter season · As noted, the A380 will operate on the airline’s evening flight. Timings are as follows: EY402 DEPART AUH 21:10 ARRIVE BKK 06:35+1 EY403 DEPART BKK 08:30 ARRIVE AUH 12:20 Commences 29th October 2026 Operates Daily Boo
summary_cn: 阿提哈德航空（Etihad Airways）宣布，自2026年10月29日起，将在阿布扎比扎耶德国际机场（Zayed International Airport）至曼谷苏万纳普（Suvarnabhumi）每日航班上引入A380客机执飞，为每日固定班次。去程EY402于21:10从阿布扎比出发，次日06:35抵达曼谷；回程EY403于08:30从曼谷出发，12:20抵达阿布扎比，进一步强化东南亚、中东与欧洲之间的航空连接。
